metrics.name: stackra.staff.roster.count
metrics.description: Count of staff per (status, employment_type). Sampled hourly. Powers headcount dashboards.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.suspended_total
metrics.description: Suspension frequency. Never labelled by reason to prevent aggregation-based leakage. Retention-critical metric for anti-discrimination compliance.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.branch_manager.invariant_violations
metrics.description: CRITICAL. Every increment indicates one-active-branch-manager-per-branch invariant broke. Should stay at 0. Fired by ReconcileBranchManagerInvariantJob.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.compensation.changes_total
metrics.description: Never labelled by amount — only compensation_type category (hourly / salary / stipend / volunteer / commission).

metrics.name: stackra.staff.compensation.large_delta_bypass_total
metrics.description: Frequency of `staff.manage.compensation.large-delta` bypass permission use. Should be low; elevated indicates over-granted permission.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.compensation.write_duration_ms
metrics.description: P99 target < 200ms. Compensation writes fire the CompensationChanged event + write to staff_compensation_history + write to normal audits — chain of writes.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.coach.created_total
metrics.description: sport_key_bucket buckets high-cardinality sport keys into categories (team_sport / individual_sport / studio_sport / other) to keep label cardinality bounded.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.coach.rating_updates_total
metrics.description: delta_direction: up_significant / up_minor / flat / down_minor / down_significant.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.probation.ending_soon_backlog
metrics.description: Count of Staff whose probation_ends_at is within 14 days. Sampled hourly. Powers the HR dashboard.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.reconcile.branch_manager_findings
metrics.description: ReconcileBranchManagerInvariantJob finding count. Should stay at 0.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.retention.pii_redactions_total
metrics.description: PurgeOffboardedStaffJob phase 1 redaction count. Baseline: ~1 per offboarded staff per 90 days.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.retention.hard_purges_total
metrics.description: PurgeOffboardedStaffJob phase 2 hard-purge count. Baseline: ~1 per offboarded staff per 7 years.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.retention.blocked_total
metrics.description: Hard-purge attempts blocked by FK RESTRICT. reason: coach_still_present / payroll_line_reference / other. Elevated indicates downstream retention drift.

metrics.name: stackra.staff.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Number of hits refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions.
